summary: test_works failures: totals_match_grouping_table + every_text_in_exactly_one_work failing on main
description: Pre-existing on clean main (verified via git stash during todo:d5ad220f): tests/test_works.py::test_totals_match_grouping_table and ::test_every_text_in_exactly_one_work fail. Likely sources/works.toml drifted from the corpus (a text added without work grouping, or counts stale — STAA added 2026-07-17 is a candidate). Not triaged further.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Cause confirmed: STAA (secret-teachings-of-all-ages, added 2026-07-17) is the 214th text dir and auto-singletons into the 54th work; tests/test_works.py pins the pre-STAA totals (53 works / 213 texts) from work-grouping.md. Fix: update the pinned totals to 54/214 and annotate work-grouping.md that totals moved with STAA. STAA correctly absent from sources/works.toml (singleton texts need no entry).

resolution.note: STAA count drift; totals updated, invariants unchanged
